EriAppHeader.note: Used in App.tsx with showThemeToggle=true, showCTA=true, source/sourceLabel/returnUrl props set

EriPageLayout.note: BDS site uses EriAppHeader + EriAppFooter directly (not EriPageLayout) due to custom TabNav between header and content

EriHeroSection.note: BDS site uses a custom hero section — no EriHeroSection required

EriCrocodileChart.note: Used in CrocodileChartExamples.tsx (Charts section live preview)

knownViolations.reason: BDS site uses EriAppHeader + EriAppFooter directly instead of EriPageLayout. This is intentional: the BDS site has a custom TabNav bar between the header and content area that EriPageLayout does not support. EriAppHeader and EriAppFooter are used in full conformance.
BDS site uses a custom hero section with a dark #232323 background that merges visually with the header and TabNav. EriHeroSection is not required here.
